title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_dad28401.png)

2. **The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit**
*2027*
The climactic final battles in The Lord of The Rings come alive on a epic board.
![The Lord of the Rings: The King's Gambit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_c59323f8.jpg)

3. **Gods & Mortals**
*2026*
A rare blend of stock trading and area control set in Homeric Greece.
![Gods & Mortals](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_f4c6ba85.jpg)

4. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_86455095.png)

5. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_b99b5c68.png)

6. **The Great Sea**
*2026*
Construct biremes, fortify trade routes, and control the ancient temples.
![The Great Sea](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_52891757.png)

7. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_fae307c9.jpg)

8. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_322c6a82.jpg)

9. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_a2e5fdd6.jpg)

10. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_95a06d98.png)

11. **Arkham Horror: The Card Game**
*2026*
Investigate the mysteries of Arkham while cosmic horrors stand in your way.
![Arkham Horror: The Card Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_4381eb11.png)

12. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_767d2f45.jpg)

13. **Slay the Spire: The Board Game**
*2024*
Craft a unique deck, discover powerful relics, and Slay the Spire together!
![Slay the Spire: The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_4ff9cdee.png)

14. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_ea141535.jpg)

15. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_6095cc45.jpg)

16. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_27671e97.jpg)

17. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_1a78e624.png)

18. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_2a8a06da.jpg)

19. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*2025*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_8ea12019.jpg)

20. **Dune: Imperium – Uprising**
*2023*
Deploy agents, build your deck, and engage in strategic battles to control Arrakis.
![Dune: Imperium – Uprising](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_b9eb5be6.jpg)

21. **Cozy Stickerville**
*2026*
Build your village with over 800 stickers! 
![Cozy Stickerville](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_904ce7d0.jpg)

22. **Speakeasy**
*2025*
Earn money running a Manhattan speakeasy business during Prohibition.
![Speakeasy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_3a134da6.jpg)

23. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_3f35ab57.jpg)

24. **Flip 7**
*2024*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_03b2201e.jpg)

25. **Hot Streak**
*2025*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-05/toplist/bgg_8156a049.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
